title: Show active time tracking no matter where you are

posts.author: Magasul (Olivér Varga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Every day I open Monday I notice that there is a timer running, which I forgot.
I really, really need an active timer that reminds me that there is an active timer running, especially when I’m not on the board that has this active timer.
It would also be super useful to be able to pause/stop/start the timer from there. Currently it’s just burried inside the task it is linked to and it’s super frustrating to not being able to see it unless you are on that board and even then it’s hard to find sometimes.

Would have a super neat place on the top bar (red rectangle) which could open up to a little window to show a timer center to manage timers in one place.
